title: [v4.0] Skip failing pull-arch test
body:
ubi8 broke our tests. Fix is #16308 (don't use images that we don't control), but it's too hard to backport to this old branch. Just skip the failing test.

If anyone thinks there's any value to keeping this test (e.g., there's a `>0.01%` chance of this functionality breaking), I will do the backport.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v4.0/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Is this branch still active? CI is failing despite multiple repeated reruns. I have to assume this branch is dead.

From experience, non rhel branches can be considered dead after we have a new minor release. There can be exceptions but I don't think this is one of them.
@mheon PTAL
The v4.0.1-rhel branch lives on, but this branch is dead.
Thank you. Closing, and I will kill the nightly cron job.
